TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang truwan ga niya mki sku Nanto Keng atu Nin'ay go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 60 buwan, 167 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 162 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 5 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Setik 81%, Tayan 11%, Bunun 4%,binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na truwan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na truwan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na truwan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na truwan hya' ga llyung. tay 'llaw na truwan hya' ga sadu. tay 'zil na truwan hya' ga ruku daya. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ truwan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku nanto keŋ atu ninʔaj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, s~ɕetik **%, tajan **%, βunun *%,βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na truwan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na truwan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na truwan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na truwan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔllaw na truwan ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕa*u. taj ʔzil na truwan ħjaʔ ɣa ruku *aja. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang truwan ga niya mki sku Nanto Keng atu Nin'ay go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 60 buwan, 167 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 162 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 5 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Setik 81%, Tayan 11%, Bunun 4%,binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na truwan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na truwan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na truwan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na truwan hya' ga llyung. tay 'llaw na truwan hya' ga sadu. tay 'zil na truwan hya' ga ruku daya. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ truwan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku nanto keŋ atu ninʔaj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, s~ɕetik **%, tajan **%, βunun *%,βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na truwan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na truwan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na truwan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na truwan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔllaw na truwan ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕa*u. taj ʔzil na truwan ħjaʔ ɣa ruku *aja. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
